en.extract:
Heuglin's masked weaver (Ploceus heuglini) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae. It is found in Senegal, Gambia and Mali to Ivory Coast and east to Uganda and western Kenya.


References


External links

'''Heuglin's masked weaver''' ('''''Ploceus heuglini''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the weaver family, [[Ploceidae]]. It is found in Senegal, Gambia and Mali to Ivory Coast and east to Uganda and western Kenya.
